topic: Nobody counts this number. But it decides whether your business grows or stays stuck.

slides.title: Nobody counts this number. But it decides everything.
It is the calls that come in when your team is busy.
slides.body: During lunch service. During a treatment. During the school run. The phone rings and nobody picks up.

slides.title: The caller does not leave a voicemail.
slides.body: They Google the next option and book there instead. You will never know that call happened.

slides.title: 5 to 15 missed calls a week.
slides.body: At £40 to £400 per booking, the maths gets uncomfortable fast.

slides.title: We build AI receptionists that answer every call.
slides.body: 24 hours a day. They know your menu, your services, your hours, and your booking rules. They book the appointment and send a WhatsApp confirmation.

slides.title: From 12 missed calls on a Friday night to zero.
slides.body: Every call answered. Every booking captured. Built in 3 days.

slides.title: If you have never counted your missed calls, send me a message.
slides.body: I will show you what it looks like for your business.
